data.title: Solaris Australian Equity Income Plus Reports Estimated Pre-Tax NTA of $1.964 per Share
data.description:

Solaris Australian Equity Income Plus Ltd. ( (AU:SET) ) has shared an announcement.

Solaris Australian Equity Income Plus Ltd., an ASX-listed Australian equity income investment company, invests in a portfolio of local shares and cash, aiming to deliver income and growth for its shareholders. The company regularly reports its net tangible asset position to keep investors informed about the underlying value of its portfolio.

The company reported an estimated pre-tax net tangible asset backing of $1.964 per share as at 27 April 2026, based on unaudited daily portfolio valuations and cash balances. This NTA figure, which is adjusted for management fees and certain operating costs and tax items but excludes unrealised tax on gains and franking credits, provides investors with an updated gauge of the underlying value supporting the SET share price.

More about Solaris Australian Equity Income Plus Ltd.

Solaris Australian Equity Income Plus Ltd. is an Australian listed investment company focused on equity income, providing investors with exposure to a portfolio of Australian shares designed to generate regular income and capital growth. Its shares trade on the ASX under the ticker SET, targeting income-focused and tax-aware investors in the local equity market.

Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ) has provided an announcement.

Siemens Energy AG has scheduled the release of its group half-year report for the 2026 financial year, covering the period from October 1, 2025 to March 31, 2026. The report is set to be published on May 12, 2026 on the company’s investor relations website, in line with regulatory disclosure requirements under German securities law.

The announcement signals the upcoming disclosure of key financial and operational metrics that will inform investors about Siemens Energy’s mid-year performance and outlook. Market participants on the Frankfurt regulated market and other German trading venues where the shares are listed are likely to watch the publication closely for indications of the company’s earnings trajectory and strategic progress.

data.title: Beat Holdings Resets EGM Record Date and Aligns AGM to Cut Costs
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Beat Holdings ( (JP:9399) ).

Beat Holdings has reset the record date for an extraordinary general meeting to 13 May 2026, replacing the original June 2025 date after agenda items remained undecided for more than 10 months. The move is intended to ensure that current shareholders, including those behind multiple revised proposals, can fully exercise their voting rights when the EGM is eventually convened.

The company has also set 13 May 2026 as the record date for its 2026 annual general meeting, aligning it with the EGM to reduce preparation and administrative costs. Beat aims to hold both meetings on the same day, a step that could streamline governance procedures while the detailed dates, venues and agendas will be announced once finalized.

More about Beat Holdings

Beat Holdings Limited is a global investment company incorporated in the Cayman Islands and headquartered in Hong Kong, with subsidiaries across Asia and Canada. Through Xinhua Mobile it acquires and licenses intellectual property rights, while GINSMS Inc., listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, provides mobile messaging and software services; Beat itself is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

Current Market Cap: Yen5.32B

data.title: UBS Group Ceases to Be Substantial Shareholder in Lindian Resources
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Lindian Resources Limited ( (AU:LIN) ) is now available.

UBS Group AG and its related bodies corporate have notified Lindian Resources Limited that they have ceased to be a substantial shareholder as of 24 April 2026. The change, formalised in a substantial holder notice lodged on 28 April 2026, indicates UBS’s voting power in Lindian has fallen below the substantial holding threshold, potentially altering the company’s institutional investor base and signalling a shift in its share register composition.

While detailed transaction data is contained in an appendix, the core outcome is that UBS no longer holds a reportable controlling stake in the company’s voting securities. This may affect perceptions of market support from major global financial institutions, although ownership changes of this nature are common in listed resource companies and do not in themselves indicate an operational change at Lindian.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:LIN) stock is a Buy with a A$0.91 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lindian Resources Limited stock, see the AU:LIN Stock Forecast page.

More about Lindian Resources Limited

Lindian Resources Limited is an Australian-listed company in the resources sector. The filing does not specify its primary commodities or projects, but it is subject to Australian corporate disclosure rules regarding substantial shareholdings.

R3D Resources Limited ( (AU:TAT) ) has issued an announcement.

Tartana Minerals Limited has updated its disclosure to confirm the issuance of a total of 61,166,677 unquoted options, comprising 56,666,677 options plus an additional 4,500,000 options, all in the same class. The clarification of the aggregate options issued provides greater transparency around the company’s capital structure and potential future dilution for existing shareholders, which may influence investor assessment of Tartana’s funding strategy and valuation.

The update amends an earlier notice lodged on the same date, ensuring that the market is fully informed of the precise volume of unquoted equity instruments on issue. Tartana Minerals Limited, an Australian explorer and project developer, focuses on critical and strategic metals such as silver, copper, gold, antimony, zinc and tin in the Chillagoe region of Far North Queensland. data.title: MeglioQuesto Secures Conditional Return of illimity as Euronext Growth Advisor in Bid to Resume Trading
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Meglioquesto S.P.A. ( (IT:MQSPA) ) has issued an update.

MeglioQuesto announced that illimity Bank, one of its main creditors, is willing to resume the role of Euronext Growth Advisor, reversing its previous decision to step back, provided several conditions linked to the company’s restructuring and financial reporting are met. The move is a key step toward the readmission of MeglioQuesto’s shares to trading on Euronext Growth Milan and reflects progress in the company’s crisis-resolution path, with operating results broadly in line with its restructuring plan and major creditors backing the strategy.

The renewed engagement is conditional on approval and publication of multiple years of separate and consolidated financial statements and half-year reports on a going-concern basis, all accompanied by clean audit opinions. MeglioQuesto must also renew its Board of Statutory Auditors via slate voting, provide required attestations on working capital and reporting systems, and ensure that any substantial post-restructuring business changes are disclosed to investors through an information document.

Given illimity’s dual role as creditor and potential shareholder after court approval of the debt restructuring, the bank has set governance measures to mitigate conflicts of interest, including capping its voting rights below 10 percent of total votes. If a conflict prevents illimity from issuing mandatory attestations under Euronext Growth rules, MeglioQuesto will appoint an alternative independent advisor, with illimity limiting its role to helping identify a suitable EGA, underscoring efforts to preserve market confidence and regulatory compliance.

More about Meglioquesto S.P.A.

MeglioQuesto S.p.A. is an Italian company listed on Euronext Growth Milan, operating through a group structure and focused on service activities that require a solid administrative and financial organization. The company has been undergoing a financial restructuring process aimed at stabilizing its operations, safeguarding continuity and ultimately enabling the readmission of its shares to trading on the junior market of Borsa Italiana.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: €11.43M

data.title: Sotetsu Holdings Hikes Year-End Dividend, Lifts Annual Payout to 70 Yen
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Sotetsu Holdings, Inc. ( (JP:9003) ) is now available.

Sotetsu Holdings, Inc. has approved a year-end dividend of 40 yen per share for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, raising the payout by 5 yen compared with its most recent forecast and the previous fiscal year. The total dividend for the year will rise to 70 yen per share, reflecting solid performance and the group’s policy of adjusting shareholder returns in line with earnings, investment plans and the operating environment.

The increase lifts the total dividend amount to 3,838 million yen, up from 3,404 million yen a year earlier, subject to approval at the June 26, 2026 shareholders’ meeting. This higher distribution underscores Sotetsu’s confidence in its financial position and signals a modestly more shareholder-friendly stance, while still emphasizing prudent reinvestment to support its core railway and related businesses over the long term.

More about Sotetsu Holdings, Inc.

Sotetsu Holdings, Inc. is a Japanese transportation group centered on railway operations, operating in a sector with a high degree of public interest. The company focuses on long-term, sound management while balancing profit distribution to shareholders with capital investment needs and the reinforcement of internal reserves.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen269.6B

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

Enterprise Metals Limited ( (AU:ENT) ) just unveiled an update.

Enterprise Metals Limited has withdrawn a previously lodged Appendix 3G relating to the issue, conversion or payment up of unquoted securities. The company states that the original notice has been cancelled and will be replaced by an Appendix 2A covering the issue and quotation of unlisted options.

The move is essentially an administrative correction in the way the new options are documented and brought to market. While it does not alter the underlying securities transaction, it ensures the capital markets disclosure is aligned with ASX requirements and provides greater clarity for investors tracking the company’s capital structure.

More about Enterprise Metals Limited

Enterprise Metals Limited is an Australian-listed company trading under the ASX code ENT. The firm operates in the resources sector, with activities typically centred on exploration and development of mineral assets for the metals and mining market.
